title: hieracium laniferum subsp. spathulatum
intro: Hieracium laniferum subsp. spathulatum, commonly known as woolly hawk's beard, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Its medicinal properties are attributed to its leaves and stems, which contain flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, inflammation, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Hieracium laniferum subsp. spathulatum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
